title: Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)
content:

interstellar transports]] *[[Vehicle Armored Carrier]]s *[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid starfighters]] *[[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|IG-227 ''Hailfire''-class droid tanks]] *[[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]] *[[Multi-Utility Transport]]s *[[HAG-M|Heavy Artillery Guns]] *[[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]] *[[Ground Armored Tank]]s *[[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platforms]] *[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] *Ground [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] |forces3=*3 [[Spectral guardian]]s |forces4= |casual1=*Presumably moderate *1 ''Acclamator''-class assault ship |casual2=*Most forces *1 ''Lucrehulk''-class core ship |casual3=*3 Spectral guardians |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|After the war, Ulic Quel-Droma sought refuge on Rhen Var. If he left any information on how to stop the Reaper, we'll find it there. It must be why the Separatists were so intent on taking the system. Obi-Wan, we're putting you in charge of recapturing Rhen Var. You'll have the entire fleet of the Inner Rim at your disposal.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} A '''battle''' took place on [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Although still a minor [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in terms of overall strategic importance to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], Rhen Var held the ruins of the [[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)|temple]] which held the tomb of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|fallen Jedi]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] and contained information that was vital to destroying the [[Dark Reaper]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Master, the majority of the Separatist forces are focused around the Jedi monument.''"
"''The information we need about the Dark Reaper must be inside Ulic's tomb.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|}} After the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' overwhelming [[Evacuation of Rhen Var|victory]] that had secured their hold of [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] in the [[Standard day/Legends|days]] prior, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] launched an assault to recapture the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with hopes of entering the [[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)|Jedi monument]] to find any information left by [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] on stopping the ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] called the [[Dark Reaper]], which they feared [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] may have been close to restoring. ==The battle== ===Downed assault ship=== {{Quote|Sir, we just received word the assault ship carrying the new walkers was shot down on the way to its target.''"
"''Anakin, we need those walkers for our assault. Get to that downed transport before the Separatists complete their mission.|A [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|}} [[File:Rhen_Var_downed_assault_ship.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces defending the downed [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]]] During the initial landing, an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] carrying experimental [[All Terrain Experimental Transport|AT-XT walkers]] was shot down, crashing in a wide, snow-covered canyon that quickly came under attack from Separatist forces determined to ensure nothing could be salvaged. Kenobi ordered Skywalker to move with haste toward the crash site in [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tanks]], joining up with the already-operational AT-XT [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] in defending the downed [[Transport/Legends|transport]], buying [[Time/Legends|time]] for the surviving walkers to mobilize and escape the wreckage. ===Separatist fuel depot=== {{Quote|Master, the walkers are still intact.''"
"''Very good! Anakin, you need to destroy that fuel depot. It will cripple their movements in the area.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|}} When the area around the transport was secured, Skywalker took command of a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of the bipedal walkers from the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] of an AT-XT himself and moved on the enemy's [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] depot. The walkers were equipped with powerful [[Mortar/Legends|mortar]] cannons and after several volleys, the depot was destroyed and the Separatist's refueling capabilities crippled. ===Separatist outpost=== {{Quote|Anakin, we need you to shut down this enemy outpost, and cut off the supply of enemy reinforcements.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|}} [[File:Rhen_Var_canyon.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on his way to the [[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)|Jedi monument]] aboard a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]]]] Having already dealt a serious blow to the Confederacy's ability to fight by destroying the Separatist's refueling depots, Skywalker took to the sky in an [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]] to meet up with Kenobi's forces, accomplishing several objectives on the way. Skywalker destroyed an outpost laden with heavy gun [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] that was holding down a substantial number of the assault's clone forces―both infantry and several armored [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE walkers]]―with suppressive fire, along with supplying the main Separatist army with further reinforcements. He also pursued two [[Vehicle Armored Carrier]]s through a narrow canyon while they were en route to drop more Separatist vehicles on the battlefield. Skywalker destroyed them both before either could unload its cargo. ===Separatist convoy=== {{Quote|Anakin, there's an enemy convoy on the move toward the Jedi monument. You must destroy them before they reach the area, or our forces will be overwhelmed.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|}} As Skywalker approached the temple, weaving through a high-walled canyon of ice, he discovered a massive convoy of Separatist vehicles consisting of numerous large [[Multi-Utility Transport]]s with [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]] moving at their flanks. Kenobi warned that should the convoy reach the Jedi monument, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] army would be vastly outnumbered. Skywalker quickly engaged the convoy, battling them from the air until every last tank was destroyed. ===Jedi monument area=== {{Quote|Anakin, we're making our final assault on the Jedi monument area. I'm deploying two platoons to spearhead the operation. One platoon is entering the area from the canyon on the right, the other from the canyon on the left. In order to recapture the area, both platoons must survive.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|}} [[File:Rhen_Var_core_ship.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA-T walker]] firing on the [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class core ship]]]] Their threat removed, Skywalker joined up with the main bulk of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army's]] ground forces at the monument, finding a [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class core ship]] and three [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Hardcell''-class interstellar transports]]. Skywalker destroyed the transports while, at Kenobi's order, two squadrons of [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier/Legends|LAAT/c gunships]] swooped down to deploy two armored AT-TE [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] as defensive support for twin [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA-T]] [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] walkers assaulting the core ship. ===Rhen Var Citadel=== At the Rhen Var Citadel, the clone task force finally arrived and wiped out the Separatist staging area which was established during the battle to coordinate the deployment of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] reinforcements to the site of the Jedi monument.''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' ===Ulic Qel-Droma's tomb=== {{Quote|Anakin, we've secured the area. But enemy reinforcements are on the way. We'll provide you with cover while you enter the monument area and retrieve the information. May the Force be with you.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|}} [[File:Rhen_Var_antechamber.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Inside the [[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)|Jedi monument]]]] Once the core ship was brought down under concentrated fire, Skywalker landed the [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]], and proceeded to enter the Jedi monument in a [[Hovertank/Legends|fighter tank]]. Before he could proceed any further, he had to defeat the [[spectral guardian]]s protecting Ulic Qel-Droma's tomb. After defeating the guardians, Skywalker reached the ancient tomb of Qel-Droma within, where he alone learned how to withstand the effects of the [[Dark Reaper]]. With his new knowledge, Skywalker declared the battle over and departed from the planet, leaving the Confederacy in defeat. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{C|Xbox Live patch only}} *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|62|Gamescape}} *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{FactFile|107|SUR 3-6|The Survival of Boba Fett}} *{{FactFile|118|RHE 1-2|Rhen Var}} *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{Imo}} *{{CSWECite|multiple}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zweite Schlacht von Rhen Var |es=Segunda Batalla de Rhen Var |pl=Druga bitwa o Rhen Var }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rhen Var (Clone Wars), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Rhen Var]] [[Category:Battles of the Dark Reaper crisis]]
